characters.appearance: Young adult male, athletic build, light brown complexion. He has dark curly hair styled in a mullet, dark eyes, and wears small hoop earrings.
Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has a blonde bob haircut and blue eyes. Her features are highly symmetrical.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Stop saying: "I'm fine, thank you", "I don't know", "You are welcome". [Stop saying: "I'm fine, thank you", "I don't know", "You are welcome".]
Character A says: ये बहुत basic है। [This is very basic.]
Character A says: मेरी English भी पहले ऐसी ही थी। [My English used to be like this too.]
Character A says: फिर मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू की। [Then I started practicing with Supernova.]
Character A says: Let me show you. [Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by calling out common, repetitive English phrases.
- Relates to the user's struggle by admitting the presenter used to speak the same way.
- Introduces Supernova as the solution and transitions into a product demo.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
!! STOP SAYING !!
Stop saying: "I'm fine, thank you"
"I don't know"
"You are welcome"
ये बहुत basic है
मेरी English भी पहले ऐसी ही थी
फिर मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू की
Let me show you

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: थोड़ा बहुत। [A little bit.]
Character B says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am Delhi. [I am Delhi.]
Character B says: Almost! Better say: "I am from Delhi". [Almost! Better say: "I am from Delhi".]
Character A says: Oh, मैं हमेशा इसमें confuse हो जाता हूँ। [Oh, I always get confused about that.]
Character B says: That's what I'm here for! आपकी English सुधारने के लिए। [That's what I'm here for! To help you improve your English.]
Character A says: But private tutors तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं। [But private tutors are very expensive.]
Character B says: Supernova private tutor से बहुत affordable है। [Supernova is much more affordable than a private tutor.]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Character B says: हाँ! रोज़ AI tutor के साथ real English conversation practice करो। [Yes! Practice real English conversation daily with an AI tutor.]
Character A says: Like a real tutor? [Like a real tutor?]
Character B says: Yes, ये आपकी grammar और pronunciation correct करता है, ताकि आप confidence के साथ बोल सको। [Yes, it corrects your grammar and pronunciation, so you can speak with confidence.]
Character A says: Okay, फिर मैं अभी Supernova download करता हूँ। [Okay, then I will download Supernova right now.]
Character B says: Great decision. Let's speak English together. [Great decision. Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core app experience: interactive AI conversation and real-time correction.
- Addresses the common user objection regarding the high cost of private tutors.
- Highlights key value propositions: daily practice, grammar/pronunciation correction, and building speaking confidence.

- Reinforces the brand name and its identity as an AI English tutor.
